title: Create execution plan for interactive installation and calibration wizard
outOfScope: PR creation/merge for future feature Work Items

sources.reason: User-provided complete development instructions for the Interactive Installation and Calibration Wizard.
Repository operating rules require a dedicated Work Item, full PR lifecycle, and serial closure.
Defines Work Item, preflight, archive, PR, and ai-close-work-item lifecycle gates.
Defines repository governance terminology and architectural boundaries.
Existing deterministic installer that future wizard Work Items must reuse.
Existing CalibrationSession that future calibration wizard Work Items must reuse.

rawUserRequest: 查收 Interactive Installation and Calibration Wizard 完整开发指示；确认并总结要求，列出工单，列表最后加入清理执行计划文档；形成修改执行计划的文档；计划明确每个工单必须完成完整流程（包括 PR、合并后的 ai-close-work-item、分支清理）后才能循环到下一个工单；本轮先完成完整的计划文档工单及其 PR/清理流程，随后停止等待用户确认计划和后续执行指示。

declaredIntent.summary: Author and close the serial execution plan for the Interactive Installation and Calibration Wizard without starting any future feature Work Item.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item changes only a plan and its governance evidence; the future feature is decomposed but not implemented here.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized creation and lifecycle completion of the plan-document Work Item only; feature implementation remains out of scope and awaits a later user instruction.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that the plan separates Bootstrap Adoption from Upgrade, forbids duplicate core logic, captures all three languages and safety gates, and places plan-document cleanup last.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The file docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-25-interactive-installation-calibration-wizard.md exists and contains the requested feature summary, architecture boundaries, constraints, and ordered Work Item table.
The ordered Work Item table contains exactly the eleven entries numbered 0 through 10, with Work Item 10 named clean-interactive-wizard-execution-plan-documents.

The Mandatory Lifecycle section lists base discovery, dedicated branch, Contract/preflight, implementation, verification, Summary, ai-finish/archive, push, PR review, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch deletion, clean worktree, and base synchronization as gates before the next item.
The Stop and Human Confirmation Gates section states that this turn is authorized only for Work Item 0 and that Work Item 1 requires a later user instruction.
guidelines: Keep this Work Item limited to the execution-plan document and its governance evidence.
Do not implement the Interactive Installation or Calibration Wizard in this Work Item.
Use the user-provided specification as the functional source of truth and preserve the existing deterministic installer and CalibrationSession boundaries.
Treat PR merge, ai-close-work-item, branch deletion, clean worktree, and base synchronization as mandatory gates between planned Work Items.

intent.problem: The supplied Interactive Installation and Calibration Wizard specification needs to become an executable, reviewable sequence of Work Items with a mandatory full PR and branch-closure lifecycle.
constraints: Scope is limited to the plan document and its governance evidence.
Future feature implementation is deferred to separately contracted Work Items.
The ordered list ends with execution-plan document cleanup.
This turn ends after plan-document closure and awaits user confirmation.
intent.rationale: A dedicated plan Work Item makes the large feature auditable, preserves the Bootstrap Adoption boundary, and prevents implementation from bypassing the repository's governance lifecycle.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The plan contains a serial Work Item list ending with plan-document cleanup.
The plan requires PR merge, ai-close-work-item, branch deletion, clean worktree, and base synchronization before the next Work Item.
Future wizard implementation remains out of scope for this Work Item and requires later user authorization.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized this plan-document Work Item and its required governance evidence, including preflight decision records.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
